page_summary.description: One short sentence describing what the page is about.

text_blocks.description: All textual paragraphs on the page, in reading order. Each block is a single string. Do not split mid-sentence; use \n only between distinct blocks.

colored_text.description: Words or short phrases printed in a non-black, non-grey color (e.g. red, blue, orange). Each item: object with text and color_description.

approximate_position.description: e.g. 'centered below the 3x3 grid', 'bottom of page'

symbols.description: Non-alphanumeric symbols/glyphs (Chinese, Turkic runes, math, special punctuation). Each item: object with description, kind, position.

description.description: Visual description of the glyph (e.g. 'Chinese character for tian (heaven) in oracle script', 'circular turkic rune', 'red question-mark glyph')

position.description: approximate location, e.g. 'centered below text blocks', 'bottom row of page'

size_estimate.description: relative size, e.g. 'large (a few cm)', 'small (line height)'

decorations.description: Decorative drawings that are not single-glyph symbols (e.g. Odin's triple horn, 7 connected rings, 9 connected rings, a face made of a circle with three dots). Each item: object with description, type, position, components.

components.description: List the parts (e.g. ['three interlocking horn shapes', 'a central cross'])

uncertain_or_unreadable.description: Anything on the page that you cannot confidently read or classify. Be honest.
